## Summary

Describe the user-visible problem and the smallest change that solves it.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check:public`
- [ ] `npm --prefix mcp-memory-server test`
- [ ] Tests cover changed behavior, or the reason they do not is documented.
- [ ] User documentation is updated for configuration or interface changes.
- [ ] The diff contains no credentials, private endpoints, private names, or local data.
- [ ] The commits contain no generated authorship attribution.

## Compatibility

Describe any storage, protocol, migration, security-boundary, or client impact.
Write `None` when the change is backward-compatible and requires no migration.
